name: Ryot
tagline: Roll your own tracker! Ryot is a self-hosted platform for tracking various aspects of life such as media consumption, fitness activities, and more.
description:
Roll your own tracker! Ryot is a self-hosted platform for tracking various aspects of life such as media consumption, fitness activities, and more.

Docs: https://github.com/ignisda/ryot?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  ryot:
    image: ignisda/ryot:v10.3.0
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgres://u7528ed4881:4cd8497c38eeb3dc573fad041d71f48e@postgresql:5432/${POSTGRES_DB:-ryot}
      - SERVER_ADMIN_ACCESS_TOKEN=e6430143312d272bb2523b021af7ea7f
      - TZ=${TZ:-Europe/Amsterdam}
    depends_on:
      postgresql:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:8000/health
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42106:8000
  postgresql:
    image: postgres:16-alpine
    volumes:
      - ryot_postgresql_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_USER=u7528ed4881
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=4cd8497c38eeb3dc573fad041d71f48e
      - POSTGRES_DB=${POSTGRES_DB:-ryot-db}
      - TZ=${TZ:-Europe/Amsterdam}
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - pg_isready -U $${POSTGRES_USER:-livcf1436de} -d $${POSTGRES_DB:-ryot}
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
volumes:
  ryot_postgresql_data: null
